title: Kent & Stowe 4.5L Metal Watering Can in Vintage Cream, Rust-Resistant Galvanised Watering Can with Handle and Detachable Rose, Classic All Year Round Garden Tools Made from Steel
features: Vintage style: This vintage cream garden watering can from Kent & Stowe is perfect as classically-styled garden décor and for the everyday watering/feeding of plants.
Removable rose head: The detachable watering can rose head allows for differing pouring patterns, but can be removed for ease of use and for storage
Rust-resistant: Crafted from galvanised steel, the metal watering can is powder coated to be sturdy yet elegant and is designed to resist rust all year round.
4.5L capacity: This garden watering can boasts a 4.5 litre capacity (1 gallon) making it ideal for plants requiring more water or to avoid having to refill.
Scope of delivery: Kent & Stowe 4.5L Metal Watering Can, colour: vintage cream, material: galvanised steel, product code: 34898

Traditional long reach watering can from Kent & Stowe allows for easy and precise feeding and watering of plants from a distance.
